query: As of July 2026, financial and bankruptcy status of these companies: Chegg Inc, America's Car-Mart Inc, JetBlue Airways, Peloton Inc, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric, Petco Health and Wellness. Which are at highest risk of bankruptcy filing in mid-2026? Any going concern warnings, debt maturities, or restructuring news?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the findings:

## Bankruptcy Risk Ranking (as of July 1, 2026)

**1. America's Car-Mart (CRMT) — HIGHEST RISK, potentially imminent.** The clear standout. The subprime auto lender is in an active lender-managed workout: a June 19, 2026 Silver Point-led amendment provides covenant relief (no new money) only through **early September 2026** (extendable to November). The company explicitly cited "potential bankruptcy," hired restructuring advisers (Houlihan Lokey, FTI, Mayer Brown), and was reported seeking a $500M rescue. Stock down ~95% from its 52-week high ($62.72 → $2.88); Q3 FY2026 net loss of -$76.7M (EPS -$9.25); dropped from the Russell 2000. **This is the one with a hard mid-to-late 2026 catalyst.**

**2. Faraday Future (FFAI, ex-FFIE) — VERY HIGH.** Survives on serial dilutive convert raises; stock ~$0.25; Nasdaq delisting cure period active; founder's prior bankruptcy history. Chronic cash burn but no formal restructuring yet.

**3. Chegg (CHGG) — MODERATE/elevated.** Distress-zone Altman Z-score (-4.6) amid AI-driven revenue collapse (-49% YoY), but **debt-free with net cash** — so near-term filing is unlikely despite the distress signals.

**4. JetBlue (JBLU) — MODERATE but long-dated.** The "">75% bankruptcy by 2027"" analyst thesis is a **2027/2029 refinancing story**, not mid-2026 — it has $2.4B liquidity now and no 2026 maturity wall.

**5. Peloton (PTON) & 6. Petco (WOOF) — LOW.** Both executing turnarounds with positive free cash flow and maturities extended to 2029/2031 respectively.

**Key going-concern/restructuring flags:** Only CRMT has explicit near-default/Chapter 11 preparation with an imminent deadline. FFAI faces delisting risk. JetBlue and Peloton have notable debt maturities but both are managed (JetBlue paid its April 2026 convert; Peloton refinanced to 2029). Full structured data with sources has been recorded.

sources.title: America's Car-Mart, Inc. Announces Agreement with Lenders to Support Ongoing Strategic Review Process
sources.snippet: Amendment with lenders led by Silver Point Finance provides covenant relief and defined timeline through early September 2026 (extendable to November); company noted risks including substantial indebtedness and potential bankruptcy.

sources.title: Lenders offer Rogers-based America's Car-Mart a lifeline until September
sources.snippet: Nine-month FY2026 loss of $104.9M; debt minus liquid assets $655.2M; closed 42 of 154 lots; Houlihan Lokey adviser; 'breathing room, not a rescue.'

sources.title: Why is America's Car-Mart stock collapsing today?
sources.snippet: Shares collapsed 63.2% on June 10, 2026 on Bloomberg report of eleventh-hour $500M capital raise to avoid bankruptcy; Q3 FY2026 net loss of $76.7M.

sources.title: Why Is America's Car-Mart Stock Surging On Monday?
sources.snippet: Stock surged 29.79% after Silver Point amendment; relief through early September extendable to November; Special Committee reviewing alternatives.

sources.snippet: Altman Z-Score of -4.6 places Chegg in distress zone; no debt, net cash expected; activist Galloway Capital 5.44% stake.

sources.title: Here's Why Analysts Give JetBlue A 75% Chance Of Bankruptcy By 2027
sources.snippet: >75% bankruptcy probability by 2027; $9B debt, six years of losses, CCC+ rating, $1.768B maturity in 2029; $2.4B liquidity currently.

sources.snippet: FY2025 net loss $602M; ended year with $1.946B cash and $8.498B total debt; JetForward beat $290M EBIT target.

sources.title: Peloton (PTON) Q3 2026 Earnings Transcript
sources.snippet: Q3 FY2026: revenue $631M, adj EBITDA $126M (+41%), FCF $151M (+59%); net debt cut 70% to $173M; expects positive full-year net income for first time.

sources.title: Peloton stock gains after investor sees turnaround signs
sources.snippet: Refinanced $800M convertibles due Feb 2026, extending maturities to 2029; total debt $1.95B; $1.18B cash; ~$345M TTM FCF.

sources.snippet: Q1 FY2026: revenue $1.5B, first positive comps +0.7%, adj EBITDA $97.3M; total debt reduced to $1.48B extended to 2031; liquidity $654.4M.

sources.title: Petco Q4 2025: profitability jumps despite sales decline
sources.snippet: FY2025 swung to $9.1M net profit from -$101.8M loss; repaid $95M debt; net-debt/EBITDA cut from 4.2x to 3.0x; FCF up 276% to $187M.
